MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_pmat_si.LongName: PMAT Total Number of Skipped Trials

cnb_pmat_rtcr.LongName: PMAT Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_pmat_rter.LongName: PMAT Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_pmat_rtto.LongName: PMAT Median Response Time for All Responses

cnb_pmat_cnt_200.LongName: PMAT Total Count of Responses Under 200 milliseconds

cnb_pmat_lrsr.LongName: PMAT Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_pmat_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Penn Matrix Reasoning Test

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
